title: AN ACT CHANGING CERTAIN NAMES OF SCHOOLS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TUY, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS.

chunks.text:
H. NO. 2212 / 59 OG No. 42, 7224 (October 21, 1963)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3679, June 22, 1963 ]

AN ACT CHANGING CERTAIN NAMES OF SCHOOLS IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TUY, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The names of the following schools in the Municipality of Tuy, Province of Batangas, are changed as follows:

(a) Tuy Elementary School to Don Gregorio Paradero Elementary School;

(b) Putol-Guinhawa Elementary School to Don Jose Zabarte, Sr. Elementary School;

(c) Malibu Elementary School to Don Santiago de Guzman Elementary School; and

(d) Mataywanak Barrio School to Dona Josefa A. de Guzman Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 22, 1963.
